StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT MIN(t.title) AS typical_european_movie FROM job.company_type AS ct, job.info_type AS it, job.movie_companies AS mc, job.movie_info AS mi, job.title AS t WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies' AND mc.note LIKE '%(theatrical)%' AND mc.note LIKE '%(France)%' AND mi.info IN ('Sweden', 'Norway', 'Germany', 'Denmark', 'Swedish', 'Denish', 'Norwegian', 'German') AND t.production_year > 2005 AND t.id = mi.movie_id AND t.id = mc.movie_id AND mc.movie_id = mi.movie_id AND ct.id = mc.company_type_id AND it.id = mi.info_type_id

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Denish' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Denmark' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='German' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Germany' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Norway' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Norwegian' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Sweden' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Swedish'
